sourceEvent.title: Should you study abroad in 2025? Complete step-by-step guide for students!
sourceEvent.overview: Webinar by QS, In parternship with GeeksforGeeks
sourceEvent.description:
QS- Quacquarelli Symonds is the world’s leading provider of insights, analytics and services to the global higher education sector. Across their 30-year history, QS has built close relationships with over 1,500 leading institutions worldwide. They’re best known for the QS World University Rankings portfolio, the flagship website TopUniversities.com, their International Student Survey and event series: The Discover master’s and Discover MBA fairs. 

At the core of the QS is the mission to help people worldwide fulfil their potential through educational achievement, international mobility, and career development. They offer a free and impartial one-to-one study abroad guidance and counselling service, through their global network of experts that you can take advantage of today. QS Applys' end-to-end study abroad guidance and counselling service includes help with:

  • Shortlisting your university options based on your profile
  • Preparation with documentation and help with application submission
  • Preparation and submission support for your student visa
  • Career prospects and employability opportunities
  • Funding and scholarship opportunities
  • Pre-departure and pre-arrival support
  • Applying to 5+ universities in a single click
  • Sharing universities options with no GRE/GMAT
  • Quick offer letters & generous scholarships
sourceEvent.what_you_learn:
In this free webinar we will be discussing on topics such as:

  • Top Courses to Study Abroad in 2025: See what's trending and plan your career path.
  • Benefits of Studying Abroad: Gain access to world-class education and faculty.
  • Maximizing ROI: Get the most out of your investment in education.
  • Top Study Destinations for 2025: Know the popular countries for international students.
  • How to Choose the Right Program and University: How QS can help students make informed decisions.
  • Financial Planning and Scholarships: Estimating the cost of studying abroad (tuition, living expenses, etc.)
  • Application Process Step-by-Step: Applications, processes, tests & more.
  • Visa and Immigration Processes: Navigating visa applications and ensuring compliance.
  • Life Abroad as an International Student: Adjusting to a new culture and managing homesickness.
  • Post-Graduation Opportunities: What lies ahead for you!

Recommended for: If you are a student in 3rd/final year of your graduation and/or if you are pursuing any tech related degree or program.

sourceEvent.description:
Watch the video below to Get Hands-on with KaneAI:

This hands-on workshop introduces participants to the future of software testing using KaneAI by TestMu AI (formerly LambdaTest). Designed for aspiring QA professionals, the session demonstrates how AI can transform a simple requirement into a fully automated, executable test flow without writing complex scripts.

Participants will learn how to move seamlessly from requirement -> natural language -> automation code -> execution -> report, all powered by an AI agent. Through a live demo of a login-to-checkout journey across browsers, attendees will understand how AI-driven testing works in real-world scenarios and how to think in terms of test intents and user journeys rather than scripts and locators.
sourceEvent.what_you_learn:
• Converting requirements into natural language test intents
  • Generating automation code using AI
  • Executing end-to-end tests across multiple browsers
  • Understanding AI-driven reporting and failure analysis
  • Adopting an industry-ready, AI-first automation mindset
  • Building practical, employable skills for QA and automation roles

BONUS Reward: Get Participation Certificate for registering and attending this Free Workshop!

sourceEvent.title: Build Smarter, Scalable AI Agents — Powered by UiPath and LlamaIndex
sourceEvent.overview: Build Smarter, Scalable AI Agents — Powered by UiPath and LlamaIndex
sourceEvent.description:
JOIN HERE | LIVE [Dec 18]

Important: This is the last workshop of the series. The registered users will get their certificate of participation after this workshop. You can attend the first 2 sessions on our Youtube Channel.

Watch the video below to Get Hands-on with UiPath


As we move deeper into the era of intelligent automation, the UiPath Platform™ is empowering people, robots, AI models, and autonomous agents to collaborate seamlessly — transforming the way enterprises operate and unlocking new levels of human potential.

AI agents are self-directed software systems capable of perceiving their environment, reasoning toward specific goals, and executing multi-step workflows with minimal human oversight. Powered by large language models (LLMs), these agents are reshaping how organizations function — enabling adaptive, scalable processes that accelerate decision-making, productivity, and innovation.

In this session, you’ll discover how to design, integrate, and deploy enterprise-grade Coded Agents on the UiPath platform, leveraging the LlamaIndex Framework to build high-accuracy, context-aware automation.

“Through this integration, developers can combine LlamaIndex + LlamaCloud to create deeply customized agents over proprietary data, and then extend them into UiPath’s governed workflows — gaining observability, compliance, and pro-developer flexibility.”
— Jerry Liu, CEO, LlamaIndex
sourceEvent.what_you_learn:
1. Understand the enterprise benefits of UiPath Coded Agents.

  2. Wrap a LlamaIndex agent as a UiPath Coded Agent.

  3. Bind Context Grounding indexes through Orchestrator.

  4. Publish, monitor, and evaluate the agent with governed telemetry.

  5. Orchestrate the agent both in Orchestrator and in a larger Maestro flow.

GET CERTIFICATION: Register for this event, attend all 3 Workshops, and get a Pariticipation Certificate!

hosts.mentor_description:
A distinguished Data Scientist, Sampurn has over 10 years of experience exclusively working on Data Science and AI. His primary focus has been shaping the BFSI landscape. With an extraordinary track record as a Data Science - Solution Architect, Sampurn has experience in creating end-to-end AI solutions by assessing business processes, collaborating with stakeholders, and crafting efficient model architectures.

Not just BFSI, Sampurn has, also, worked in various domains like Energy Management, Healthcare, Edtech, and has even worked with the Ministry of Defence to integrate AI in the nation's security. In recent times, Sampurn's paramount achievement has been creating virtual workers using multi-agentic frameworks for a large insurance organization. Currently, he is leading the Data Science Practice within GeeksForGeeks helping optimize various processes by creating in-house solutions. His primary role is as a mentor to guide students and working professionals in their Data Science journey.

sourceEvent.title: Practical AI for Developers: Advanced Agentic Workflows with GitHub Copilot
sourceEvent.overview: Practical AI for Developers: Advanced Agentic Workflows with GitHub Copilot
sourceEvent.description:
Ready to move beyond simple code suggestions? This session dives into the advanced, agentic capabilities of GitHub Copilot that let you delegate tasks to AI agents and orchestrate them to get work done. You’ll see how Copilot Agent Mode and Coding Agent can automate multi-step tasks, debug issues, and iterate on solutions - so you can focus on directing the workflow instead of doing everything manually.

We’ll also explore how to ground Copilot’s responses with context using Copilot Spaces, making AI assistance more accurate and project-aware. Finally, get a preview of GitHub Spark, where you’ll see how to prototype entire applications using just natural language. This is a hands-on, developer-focused session packed with practical demos and real-world workflows.
sourceEvent.what_you_learn:
1. Automate repetitive coding tasks and handle complex workflows with Copilot Agent Mode and Coding Agent.
  2. Debug and fix issues faster using self-healing and iterative capabilities.
  3. Improve AI accuracy by grounding responses with project context through Copilot Spaces.
  4. Prototype applications from scratch using natural language with GitHub Spark.
  5. Adopt best practices for integrating these tools into your development workflow.

hosts.mentor_description: Director, International Developer Relations, GitHub

Attempt the contest between 6PM to 10PM on 30th Aug 2025 to win AWS goodies

What’s emerging is a class of tools that act as conversational interfaces — connecting with multiple systems, navigating knowledge bases on their own, deciding when and how to use them, and either answering you or doing the job for you. And in parallel, we’re entering environments where developers describe what they want, and systems start building it.
sourceEvent.what_you_learn:
• How AI is shifting from assisting to reshaping the way work happens.
  • Ways AI helps teams move faster and make sharper, data-driven decisions.
  • How conversational AI tools can connect to multiple systems and act autonomously.
  • The role of AI in navigating knowledge bases and executing tasks without human micromanagement.
  • How developer workflows are evolving toward simply describing needs and letting AI build solutions.
  • What this means for focusing human effort on high-value, meaningful work.

sourceEvent.title: Be a Technical AI Agent Architect: Build, Orchestrate & Deploy AI Agents
sourceEvent.overview: Be a Technical AI Agent Architect: Build, Orchestrate & Deploy AI Agents
sourceEvent.description:
This hands-on technical workshop, led by Jithin George (CTO, Lyzr AI), is designed for AI developers and engineers who want to go beyond just the hype about AI and start building robust, production-grade AI agents — solving real world business use cases. You'll gain practical skills in orchestrating autonomous agents, implementing agent workflows, and ensuring safe and responsible deployment at scale.

The session is built around real-world enterprise use cases, showing you how to design agent architectures that optimize for performance, cost, and security — no matter the LLM or infra stack.

Participants who sign up on Lyzr will receive 500 credits on the platform to build agents. As this is a hands-on workshop, they can start building in real time during the session using these credits. You can start building on the platform in real time during the session using those credits, and even use them to create something for your own personal projects.

Agenda:

  • Introduction to Agentic AI Systems
  • Who is an AI Agent Architect?
  • Types of Agent Orchestrations & When to Use Them
  • Live Demo: Building an AI Agent using Lyzr Studio
  • Best Practices: Safe, Responsible & Scalable Deployment
  • Q&A + Exclusive Developer Opportunities

Important: Participants would get a lot more value if they have signed up on https://studio.lyzr.ai/ before the session since this is a hands-on workshop.
sourceEvent.what_you_learn:
• Understand the AI Agent Architect role and why it matters in 2025+
  • Learn how to build different types of agent orchestrations (Manager-style, Chain-style, Multi-agent)
  • Explore safe and responsible AI deployment practices for production-grade AI agents.
  • Hands-on demo to build & deploy your own AI agent
  • Get insights from how top enterprises are deploying GenAI agents securely

sourceEvent.overview: An exclusive offline event in Hyderabad designed to connect aspiring tech professionals with seasoned industry leaders. sourceEvent.description:
Embark on a transformative learning experience with GeeksforGeeks' exclusive offline Tech Talk series in Hyderabad — a curated event designed for aspiring developers, tech enthusiasts, and professionals aiming to upskill and stay ahead in the evolving tech landscape.

What to Expect?

  1. MERN Full Stack Development – Build robust web applications from front-end to back-end using MongoDB, Express.js, React, and Node.js.

  2. Data Structures & Algorithms (DSA) – Strengthen your coding fundamentals and problem-solving skills essential for technical interviews and competitive programming.

  3. Data Analytics – Learn to extract meaningful insights from data using practical tools and industry-relevant techniques.

  4. Interactive Q&A & Networking – Engage with industry experts, gain career clarity, and network with like-minded peers and mentors.

Who Should Attend?

Undergraduate and postgraduate students (B.Tech, BCA, MCA, M.Tech), fresh graduates entering the software industry, and professionals seeking upskilling or a career transition into modern tech domains.

Why Attend?


Gain Practical, Industry-Relevant Knowledge – Learn directly from experts who work on cutting-edge technologies.
Clarify Your Career Path – Discover which domain best aligns with your skills and long-term goals.
Build a Strong Technical Foundation – Strengthen core concepts that top companies look for in candidates.
Hands-On Learning – Apply what you learn immediately in interactive, mentor-led sessions.
Expand Your Professional Network – Connect with industry mentors, like-minded peers, and potential collaborators.
Enhance Your Resume – Add structured learning experience from a credible platform to your professional profile.

Event Schedule:

  • Week 1:
    • Monday, 26th May | 6:00 PM onwards – MERN Full Stack
    • Wednesday, 28th May | 6:00 PM onwards – Data Structures & Algorithms
    • Friday, 30th May | 6:00 PM onwards – Data Analytics
  • Week 2:
    • Monday, 2nd June | 6:00 PM onwards – MERN Full Stack
    • Wednesday, 4th June | 6:00 PM onwards – Data Structures & Algorithms
    • Friday, 6th June | 6:00 PM onwards – Data Analytics
  • Week 3:
    • Monday, 9th June | 6:00 PM onwards – MERN Full Stack
    • Wednesday, 11th June | 6:00 PM onwards – Data Structures & Algorithms
    • Friday, 13th June | 6:00 PM onwards – Data Analytics

Venue: Reliance Cyber Ville, Plot No 17 to 24, Vittal Rao Nagar, Madhapur, Hyderabad

Important: Participants are requested to bring their laptops for full participation in hands-on activities.

Take this opportunity to immerse yourself in real-world tech discussions, get mentored by seasoned professionals, and empower your career journey with clarity and purpose.
sourceEvent.what_you_learn:
1. Tech Career Pathways – Explore different career options like Software Development, Data Science, AI/ML, Cybersecurity, Cloud Computing, and more.
  2. Industry Trends & In-Demand Skills – Understand the latest technologies and skills that companies are actively hiring for.
  3. How to Build a Strong Resume & Portfolio – Learn what makes a standout resume and how to showcase your projects effectively.
  4. Roadmap to Landing Your Dream Job – Step-by-step guidance on preparing for interviews, mastering DSA, and excelling in coding assessments.
  5. Scholarship Test Insights – Get familiar with the scholarship test format and key strategies to maximize your score.
  6. Live Q&A with Experts – Ask your doubts directly to industry professionals and receive career guidance tailored to you.


This session will equip you with practical knowledge and actionable steps to accelerate your journey in the tech industry!

hosts.mentor_description: Sudhakar Reddy Peddannagari is a highly experienced MERN Stack trainer with over 20 years of expertise in web technologies and software education. He has a proven track record of delivering both online and offline training sessions, specializing in Full Stack Development, including JavaScript, React, Node.js, and MongoDB. Sudhakar has trained students and interns at various institutions and organizations, such as CBIT, Innomatics Research Labs, and Mouritech. His strong communication skills, coupled with his ability to quickly adapt to new technologies, make him an effective and motivating educator. Sudhakar is passionate about maximizing learning opportunities and has a deep understanding of both front-end and back-end technologies, making him an invaluable mentor for aspiring MERN Stack developers.

sourceEvent.title: Unleashing the Power of GitHub Copilot: Building Apps with Agentic AI
sourceEvent.overview: Unleashing the Power of GitHub Copilot: Building Apps with Agentic AI
sourceEvent.description:
GitHub Copilot is the world's most widely adopted AI developer tool, revolutionizing the way developers code. From real-time code suggestions and chat assistance in the IDE to breaking down complex coding concepts in natural language. GitHub Copilot empowers developers across the software development lifecycle, boosting productivity and creativity.

With the new agentic AI capabilities of GitHub Copilot, such as Agent Mode, AI can handle the tasks you don't want to do, giving you more time to focus on what you love. GitHub Copilot's Agent Mode can iterate on its own code, recognize errors, and fix them automatically. It can suggest terminal commands and prompt you to execute them, and it even analyzes run-time errors with self-healing capabilities.
sourceEvent.what_you_learn:
• Discover the various agentic AI features of GitHub Copilot, including Agent Mode, Copilot Autofix, and Copilot Code Review.
  • Learn how to leverage GitHub Copilot's agentic AI capabilities for efficient development.
  • Understand when to use Copilot Edits and Copilot Agent Mode.
  • Integrate GitHub Copilot seamlessly into your development workflow.

Join Our Exclusive Webinar

At Accenture, we are revolutionizing Finance and Accounting to drive unparalleled value. Our team is on a transformative journey, focusing on:

Join our webinar to learn how our Finance and Accounting team is using technology and human ingenuity to turn change into meaningful impact. Don’t miss this opportunity to be part of a forward-thinking community and explore exciting career opportunities with Accenture.


March 28, 2025 INDIA time: 10:30 a.m. PHILIPPINES time: 1:00 p.m.

Dive into the world of Accenture Operations within finance and Accounting. Learn how the advanced tools are not just transforming the landscape but also how they can amplify your decision-making capabilities, streamline operations, and introduce revolutionary working methods. Eligible candidate profiles will be reviewed and shortlisted professionals will be contacted directly by the Accenture team.

hosts.mentor_description:
Vikas is a Software Engineer and mentor with 3+ years of industry experience specializing in Full Stack Development and modern web technologies. He has expertise in building scalable, high-performance web applications using robust backend architectures, efficient APIs, and modern frontend frameworks to deliver seamless user experiences.

Along with Full Stack Development, Vikas also has experience working with emerging AI technologies and has conducted sessions on Generative AI, RAG systems, AI tools, and practical AI integration in modern applications.

As a mentor and trainer, Vikas has trained 12,000+ students through 26+ online and offline batches, including classroom programs, bootcamps, and corporate training sessions. He has also conducted 430+ offline seminars and YouTube sessions focused on Full Stack Development, career guidance, and software engineering. His teaching methodology emphasizes hands-on learning, real-world projects, and practical problem-solving, helping students build strong technical foundations and industry-ready skills. Many of his students have secured positions at leading organizations such as Tata 1mg, Salesforce, Wipro, and Celebal Technologies.

Vikas has been recognized three times as a LinkedIn Top Voice in Web Development for his contributions to the developer community, where he regularly shares insights on software engineering, development best practices, and emerging technologies.

In addition, he serves as a Google Cloud Jury Member and has judged 38+ national and college hackathons, evaluating innovative projects and mentoring aspiring developers across web, cloud, and software engineering domains.

Students (B.Tech, BCA, MCA, M.Tech) or any one aspiring for careers in tech. Freshers looking to break into software development, data science, AI/ML, and more. Professionals seeking career transitions or upskilling opportunities.
